title: @spideriq/cli Quick Reference
summary: Run SpiderIQ from the terminal via @spideriq/cli — auth flow, project binding, pages CRUD, marketplace search, deploy, output formats. Use whenever the user asks 'how do I run SpiderIQ from the terminal?', 'spideriq CLI commands', 'CLI for cron / CI / scripts', 'headless SpiderIQ', or any command-line / shell-script SpiderIQ request. Same primitives as MCP, no IDE required, supports YAML/MD output for token-efficient agent loops.
